audit_items.proof_trace: Enforcement mechanism is in external alloy-evm crate's BlockExecutor implementation, not in Reth codebase. Reth delegates to alloy-evm::BlockExecutor::execute_block() (line 536 in crates/evm/evm/src/execute.rs), which must enforce EIP-4788 system tx ordering, but implementation is external and cannot be audited in this repository.
